Records.authors: Borowka, S., Heinrich, G., Jahn, S., Jones, S.P., Kerner, M., Schlenk, J., Zirke, T.
Records.description: Massless on-shell two-loop planar 7-propagator double box with an irreducible numerator (k1+p3)^2 = D8. Two implementations are provided: (a) box2L_invprop.py with powerlist=[1,1,1,1,1,1,1,-1] treating the numerator as an inverse propagator, and (b) box2L_contracted_tensor.py with the numerator written as k1.k1 + 2 k1.p3 + p3.p3. pySecDec evaluates the integral numerically through eps^0 at s=-3, t=-2 (Tab. box2l), with leading pole at eps^{-4}.
